## Verification

- [ ] `make build`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] Frontend build/lint/test, if `web/` changed
- [ ] `make proto`, if `proto/` changed
- [ ] `make sqlc`, if `db/queries/` changed
- [ ] Coverage remains >= 80%

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code stays within hexagonal boundaries; domain imports no adapters/platform
- [ ] Security reviewed: validation, authz, secrets, PII/logging
- [ ] No fabricated candidate skills or experience
- [ ] UX standards met where applicable: skeletons, pagination, no spinners
- [ ] Docs updated when API/proto/workflow/agent guidance changed
- [ ] `agent_plan.md` story status and Sprint board updated
- [ ] Screenshots or recordings attached for user-facing UI changes
